center.name: 巴拿马运河
center.summary: 巴拿马运河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Sungrebe、Moustached antwren，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in Panama, on the Caribbean slope in the Panama Canal area and Guna Yala (San Blas) and on the Pacific slope from Panamá Province east

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sungrebes are found in heavily vegetated, mostly freshwater wetland environments, from northeast Mexico south along the Gulf and Caribbean coasts through Panama, where they live throughout the Canal Zone and Darien, and then along the Pacific coast from Panama through central Ecuador
